articles.author: Bryan Mena, CNN
articles.title: Even wealthy Americans are souring on the economy as gas prices spike and stocks fall - Yahoo Finance UK
articles.description: Americans are growing more pessimistic about the US economy as the war on Iran continues to roil markets, with sentiment falling across all income groups...
articles.content:
A fuel pump is connected to a car at a gas station in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, on March 5. - Kena Betancur/Bloomberg/Getty Images
